name: WH_GATE_OPEN
keywords: GateSpace sched_spawn wake recharge OPEN volt volh WH_OP_GATE_OPEN gate_open_tile gate_open_space_ctx
desc: WH opcode: open a single tile gate. C1.A=gate_id (low16), target_kind=WH_TGT_TILE.

name: WH_GATE_CLOSE
keywords: GateSpace sched_tick sleep CLOSE volt volh WH_OP_GATE_CLOSE gate_close_tile gate_close_space_ctx
desc: WH opcode: close a single tile gate. C1.A=gate_id (low16), target_kind=WH_TGT_TILE.

name: WH_WRITE
keywords: WhiteHole TimeLane tick commit log wh_write_record WH_LANE wh_cap
desc: Write a 2-cell WH record at circular tick-indexed address (mod WH_CAP).

name: BH_DECAY
keywords: BlackHole energy TTL decay pid bh_decay_energy bh_set_energy sched_tick BH_STATE
desc: Decay BH energy for pid; reaching 0 triggers SLEEP + gate close.

name: WH_IPC_SEND
keywords: IPC send recv sched_ipc_send sched_ipc_recv ipc_cursor dst_pid src_pid payload_key mount_canvas Phase5
desc: WH IPC record. C0:A=dst_pid,G=dst_canvas,R=slot. C1:A=src_pid,G=gate_hi,R=gate_lo. Consumed via ipc_cursor scan.

name: CVP_SAVE
keywords: cvp_save_ctx EngineContext CvpHeader scan_policy bpage_version contract_hash CVP_CONTRACT_HASH_V1 CANVAS_BASE GATE_STATE WH_LANE BH_STATE
desc: Save EngineContext to .cvp file: header locks + TLV sections + per-section CRC32.

name: CVP_LOAD
keywords: cvp_load_ctx dry_run CVP_LOCK_SKIP GATE_STATE active_open sync tick restore save_tick
desc: Load .cvp into EngineContext. Enforces lock fields (use CVP_LOCK_SKIP to skip). Restores tick, cells, gates, active_open.

name: CVP_VALIDATE
keywords: cvp_validate magic CVP1 header_crc CRC32 lock mismatch CVP_ERR_LOCK wh_cap integrity
desc: Check .cvp header magic/version/CRC and lock fields without loading canvas data.

name: CVP_REPLAY
keywords: cvp_replay_ctx WH_LANE from_tick to_tick wh_cap circular window wh_exec_min gate determinism TimeMachine
desc: Replay WH records from .cvp into ctx. Clamps to retained WH window [save_tick-WH_CAP, save_tick].

name: ENGCTX_TICK
keywords: engctx_tick ctx->tick WH_OP_TICK heartbeat advance engine loop
desc: Advance engine by one tick. Writes WH_OP_TICK heartbeat record. Returns 0 or -1.

name: ENGCTX_REPLAY
keywords: engctx_replay from_tick to_tick wh_exec_record WH_CAP window gate open close deterministic
desc: Re-execute WH records in tick range as side-effects (gates). Clamps to WH window.

name: ENGCTX_INSPECT
keywords: engctx_inspect_cell x y at_tick snapshot canvas_contract ABGR
desc: Return cell at (x,y) from current snapshot. Phase4: snapshot-only; Phase5 adds sparse diff.
